prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `20818e16`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `20818e16` in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_20818e16/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_20818e16/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_20818e16/generator.py). The rule is: take each non-background color’s full bounding box, sort those boxes by bounding-box area, then overlay them at the origin on the largest box so the smaller rectangles remain visible in the top-left. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, so no `notes.md` was needed.

The generator builds 3-4 rectangles with strictly increasing bbox sizes, keeps one small isolated rectangle, and uses 1-2 controlled corner overlaps against the largest rectangle with randomized paint order so the inputs look like the official partially occluded family. No new shared primitive was needed.

Verification:
- Official examples: `pass 20818e16: 4/4 official examples passed`
- Generated examples: `pass 20818e16: 1000/1000 generated examples passed`

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20818e16/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20818e16/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20818e16/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20818e16/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20818e16/previews/preview_03.png).
